# Functional Specification — example work package

Tiny fixture used by planner-lifecycle E2E tests. A real work package
would enumerate capabilities and use cases in detail; this stub names one
capability with one use case so the mock planner can emit a deterministic
task graph.

## CAP-1: Example Capability

A feature the system exposes to its users.

### UC-1.1: Example Use Case

Preconditions, trigger, and post-conditions for one interaction with CAP-1.

Acceptance criteria:

- The system accepts the input and produces the expected output.
- Failure cases return a clear error message.
